name: badge
title: Badge
description: Small status descriptor. Status variants (success/warning/destructive/info) map to clinical states: normal, elevated, critical, low.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style; status variants are tinted, not solid.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render as the child element (Radix Slot).

clinicalNotes: Status variants use tinted backgrounds with colored text for readability at small sizes. Never rely on color alone for clinical state — pair with an explicit label (e.g. "Elevated").
notes: Ported from petals_ui; Petals `pink` variant removed.
